Modern attacks move laterally across hybrid networks, identities, and multi-cloud environments at machine speed. Vectra AI builds on its market leading NDR foundation to deliver continuous observability, clear risk signal, and confident action across the modern network. We find the attacks other tech can't, so you can stop them. 02:23 Vectra AI is named Highest in Execution and Vision in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for NDR Our story Since our founding in 2011, our mission has been simple, to help make the world a safer and fairer place. As enterprises have evolved into hybrid and AI driven environments where attacks move at machine speed, turning that mission into reality has required a fundamentally new approach to network detection and response. Over the years, we have built a team of security researchers, data scientists, and engineers focused on understanding how real attacks move across modern networks, identities, and cloud environments. This approach has helped more than 2,000 hybrid and multi cloud organizations continuously reduce exposure and stop advanced attacks before they become breaches. We help security teams turn the tables on attackers by applying artificial intelligence and machine learning to reveal exposure gaps, deliver clear and reliable attack signal with context, and enable confident action, while remaining absolutely obsessed with delivering a first class customer experience. Our founding belief still guides how we approach modern network detection and response today. From the desk of our founder Before my time at Vectra AI, a customer once told me about a sophisticated nation-state attack, which turned into a major breach, that affected them and several other companies. The customer asserted that the products my company had sold them could have alerted them of a critical attack. The assertion that enough signal to detect this breach was observable, and the advancements that AI and ML technologies were undergoing at the time convinced me to try to help protect organizations from such breaches. Thus, Vectra AI started in 2011 with the idea that AI and ML could be applied to the problem of finding and stopping sophisticated attacks. To accomplish that goal, we assembled a team of the industry’s most skilled data scientists, security researchers and software engineers to develop an innovative platform that delivers the most accurate attack signal. While we’re proud of our innovation we’ve gained along the way – the 35 security patents, 12 of which are referenced in MITRE D3FEND – our goal has always been to: Make the world a safer and fairer place. From day 1, we've been striving to keep people, their data, and their way of life safe. Build a culture we could be proud of.
